feature.name: WebGPU: Texture component swizzle
feature.creator: fbeaufort@google.com
feature.summary:
Functionality added to the WebGPU spec after its first shipment in a browser.

Allows GPUTextureViews to rearrange or replace the color components from texture's red/green/blue/alpha channels when accessed by a shader.

intake.finding:
ChromeStatus record (created 2025-10-13 by fbeaufort@google.com). Functionality added to the WebGPU spec after its first shipment in a browser.

Allows GPUTextureViews to rearrange or replace the color components from texture's red/green/blue/alpha channels when accessed by a shader. Category: Graphics. Blink component: Blink>WebGPU. Stars: 89.
intake.limitations: ChromeStatus record fields only; intent thread content not directly accessible.

incubation.finding: Feature targets web feature 'webgpu'. This is an official WebDX feature. Problem definition depends on the spec/explainer which was not directly accessible.

release.finding: Shipped in Chrome 142 (In developer trial (Behind a flag)).

adoption.finding: The WebDX/WebFeature counter 'Webgpu' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 290) measured 2.2952% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2025-02-20 with 515 data points. Mapping confidence: declared-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the Webgpu family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 142 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
